name: Either

unions.name: Either
unions.comment:
For when you want a function that needs to take/return values of
    two different types and you don't want to define a whole type.

values.name: elim
values.comment:
There's only one possible implementation of this function! Try to guess
    what it is.
values.type: (a -> c) -> (b -> c) -> Either a b -> c

values.name: mapBoth
values.comment:
There's only one possible implementation of this function! Try to guess
    what it is.
values.type: (a -> a_) -> (b -> b_) -> Either a b -> Either a_ b_

values.name: mapLeft
values.comment:
There's only one possible implementation of this function! Try to guess
    what it is.
values.type: (a -> a_) -> Either a b -> Either a_ b

values.name: mapRight
values.comment:
There's only one possible implementation of this function! Try to guess
    what it is.
values.type: (b -> b_) -> Either a b -> Either a b_
